# Muhammad Zubair - Clinical Psychologist & Web Developer
> Professional online counseling and therapy services. Serving clients across Gulf countries, Pakistan, and India.

## About
Muhammad Zubair is a Clinical Psychologist with an MS in Clinical Psychology from Bahria University, Lahore. He offers individual therapy, relationship counseling, child & adolescent therapy, and online sessions. He also builds web platforms for mental health professionals.

## Services
- **Individual Therapy**: One-on-one sessions for anxiety, depression, stress management.
- **Online Counseling**: Secure, confidential video sessions worldwide.
- **Child & Adolescent Therapy**: Behavioral, emotional, and learning support.
- **Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)**: Evidence-based approach.
- **Web Development**: Custom mental health websites and platforms.

## Pricing
- Gulf Countries: AED 75/session
- International: USD 20/session
- Package: AED 600/10 sessions
